tasks.title: Scale CloudNative-PG for Production
subtasks: Scale sigma1-postgres CloudNative-PG cluster from 1 to 3 replicas.
Enable PgBouncer connection pooling for sigma1-postgres.
Configure automated daily backups for sigma1-postgres.
Configure WAL archiving for sigma1-postgres to S3/R2.

tasks.title: Harden Redis/Valkey for Production
subtasks: Enable Redis Sentinel with 3 replicas for sigma1-valkey.
Configure appropriate maxmemory policy for sigma1-valkey.

tasks.title: Scale NATS to 3-Node Cluster with JetStream Persistence
Implement Production-Grade Network Policies
subtasks: Define and apply granular network policies restricting pod-to-pod traffic within and between namespaces (e.g., sigma1 and databases).
Ensure only necessary ports are open for inter-service communication.

tasks.title: Configure Cloudflare CDN for Static Assets
subtasks: Configure Cloudflare CDN for static assets served by the application.
Optimize caching rules and edge delivery for improved performance.
